summary: Prashnakosh RC1 Bug Fixes Testing - All 3 bugs VERIFIED FIXED. 1) Super Admin Users link now navigates to /superadmin/users (not /admin/users). 2) Logo is transparent shield PNG with no white background. 3) JIGNYASA text removed from all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: app-shell.tsx correctly splits Users link: admin → /admin/users, super_admin → /superadmin/users (lines 32-33)
BrandLogo.tsx has no JIGNYASA text, tagline shows 'Knowledge • Excellence • Innovation'
brand.ts tagline is 'Knowledge • Excellence • Innovation' (no Jignyasa)
logo.png is transparent PNG with shield icon only (verified visually)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RC1 Bug Fixes verified. All 3 bugs fixed: 1) Super Admin sidebar Users link navigates to /superadmin/users (verified via Playwright), 2) Logo is transparent shield PNG (verified visually - no white background box), 3) JIGNYASA text removed from BrandLogo.tsx and brand.ts (verified via code review and UI testing).

super_admin_users_navigation.page_content: Users Management with Select School dropdown

logo_transparency.description: Shield logo with P on transparent background, no white box

bug_1_blank_admin_users.issue: Super Admin clicking Users in sidebar went to /admin/users (blank page)
bug_1_blank_admin_users.fix: app-shell.tsx line 32-33 splits Users link by role: admin→/admin/users, super_admin→/superadmin/users
bug_1_blank_admin_users.verification: Playwright test confirmed /superadmin/users loads with Users Management interface

bug_2_logo_white_background.fix: logo.png replaced with transparent shield-only PNG
bug_2_logo_white_background.verification: Visual inspection of logo.png shows checkered transparency background

bug_3_jignyasa_text.fix: Removed from BrandLogo.tsx, brand.ts tagline changed to 'Knowledge'
bug_3_jignyasa_text.verification: Code review and UI testing confirmed no JIGNYASA text on any page
